function.message: I can’t complete this inbox item as written because one of the five requested OCR source files is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_18__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`. The non-underscored file exists, but the request explicitly includes the underscored path, so I stopped without making partial edits.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox and workflow rules, avoid partial completion and do not mutate workspace when request is blocked by missing canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` requires OCR of five specific files. Directory check of `50_finance/purchases` showed only the non-underscored `2026_01_18__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`, and a global filename lookup for the underscored variant returned no result, so the task is incomplete/ambiguous as specified.
